summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Restaurant QR Menu application. Backend APIs working perfectly (24/24 tests passed). Frontend functionality working correctly including menu browsing, cart management, checkout process, admin dashboard, and order management. Payment integration with Stripe configured and ready.

minor_issues.issue: Returns PNG image binary data which causes JSON parsing warning in test, but endpoint works correctly
minor_issues.impact: Cosmetic only - QR code generation works fine

ui_bugs.issue: On desktop viewport, product modal 'Add to Cart' button can be difficult to click due to cart overlay positioning
ui_bugs.workaround: Works perfectly on mobile viewport (390px width)

design_issues.issue: WebSocket connection shows warning in console but real-time features work correctly

passed_tests: All restaurant, category, product, table endpoints (100% success)
Order creation and management (full CRUD operations)
Payment integration with Stripe (checkout session creation)
Menu page with categories and product filtering
Product details modal with extras and notes
Complete checkout flow (order creation to tracking)

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor UI issue on desktop modal)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix desktop product modal overlay issue where cart button intercepts clicks on 'Add to Cart' button. Consider adjusting z-index or modal positioning for desktop viewports. Application is fully functional otherwise.
